message:
🌱 Add cert-manager: Support Azure Workload Identities  mission (#1304)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-5085-support-azure-workload-identities",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Support Azure Workload Identities ",
+    "description": "Support Azure Workload Identities . Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cert-manager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cert-manager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cert-manager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nAzure recently added Azure Workload Identities (see https://github.com/Azure/azure-workload-identity and https://azure.github.io/azure-workload-identity/docs/) to AKS."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Azure Workload Identities ",
+        "description": "### Pull Request Motivation\n\nThis PR adds the ability to to authenticate against Azure using Workload Identities. Closes #5085\n\nBumps `adal` version to 0.9.20 in order to make use of  `NewServicePrincipalTokenFromFederatedToken`\n\n### Kind\n\nfeature\n\nzure DNS\n```\n\n### Work in Progress!\n\nI will need\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ServiceAccount\nmetadata:\n  name: external-dns\n  namespace: external-dns\n  labels:\n    azure.workload.identity/use: 'true'\n  annotations:\n    azure.workload.identity/client-id: bbbbbbbb-xxx-yyyyy-mmmm-rrrrrrrrrr\n    azure.workload.identity/service-account-token-expiration: '86400'\n    azure.workload.identity/tenant-id: yyyyyyy-xxx-zzzz-xxxx-rrrrrrrrrrrrr\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cert-manager to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cert-manager:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade cert-manager cert-manager/cert-manager --namespace cert-manager\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support Azure Workload Identities \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Pull Request Motivation\n\nThis PR adds the ability to to authenticate against Azure using Workload Identities. Closes #5085\n\nBumps `adal` version to 0.9.20 in order to make use of  `NewServicePrincipalTokenFromFederatedToken`\n\n### Kind\n\nfeature\n\nzure DNS\n```\n\n### Work in Progress!\n\nI will need some help to get this across the line. In particular, I am fairly certain that the zz_generated..",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ServiceAccount\nmetadata:\n  name: external-dns\n  namespace: external-dns\n  labels:\n    azure.workload.identity/use: 'true'\n  annotations:\n    azure.workload.identity/client-id: bbbbbbbb-xxx-yyyyy-mmmm-rrrrrrrrrr\n    azure.workload.identity/service-account-token-expiration: '86400'\n    azure.workload.identity/tenant-id: yyyyyyy-xxx-zzzz-xxxx-rrrrrrrrrrrrr",
+        "AZURE_AUTHORITY_HOST: https://login.microsoftonline.com/\nAZURE_CLIENT_ID: bbbbbbbb-xxx-yyyyy-mmmm-rrrrrrrrrr\nAZURE_FEDERATED_TOKEN_FILE: /var/run/secrets/azure/tokens/azure-identity-token\nAZURE_TENANT_ID: yyyyyyy-xxx-zzzz-xxxx-rrrrrrrrrrrrr"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cert-manager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Serviceaccount"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/5085",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pull/5308"
+    },
+    "reactions": 19,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-17T06:25:04.303Z",
